content:
# Leak-Off Test

**Summary**: A method to measure the amount of fluid and solids that enter a formation during drilling operations.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] used leak-off experimental setup to simulate drilling fluid circulation and flooding into core samples.

- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] applied leak-off tests (LOT) in the Khafji reservoir to determine the magnitude of minimum horizontal stress.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] applied leak-off tests (LOT) in the Khafji reservoir to determine the magnitude of minimum horizontal stress.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The study used it to evaluate how different calcium carbonate sizes affected invasion depth and return permeability. ([[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001, p. 17]])

- The shut-in pressure value from LOT provided a minimum horizontal stress of 0.72 psi/ft. ([[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002, p. 144]])
